description: Install new dependencies and establish the design system foundation: new Tailwind config with Notion-inspired tokens, complete globals.css theme system with CSS variables for dark/light mode, design system components (Button, Input, Modal, Toggle, Card, Badge), and updated app/layout.tsx with theme context provider.
steps: Add new dependencies to package.json: @dnd-kit/core, @dnd-kit/sortable, @dnd-kit/utilities, date-fns, recharts. Run pnpm install.

Rewrite tailwind.config.ts with Notion-inspired design tokens: neutral gray palette (like Notion's warm grays), accent colors (indigo/violet primary, emerald success, amber warning, rose danger), Notion-like font stack (Inter for UI, JetBrains Mono for code), generous spacing scale, refined border-radius tokens, subtle shadows, spring-based animation keyframes (fade-in, slide-up, slide-down, scale-in, float, breathe, shimmer).

Rewrite app/globals.css with a complete CSS variable theme system: :root for light mode, .dark class for dark mode variables. Variables for --bg, --bg-secondary, --bg-tertiary, --surface, --surface-hover, --border, --border-subtle, --text-primary, --text-secondary, --text-tertiary, --accent, --accent-hover, --accent-subtle. Include utility classes: .glass (subtle blur), .glass-strong (heavy blur), gradient text utilities, smooth scrollbar styling, focus ring utilities, reduced motion media query. Dark mode should be the default (html has 'dark' class).
Create components/ui/theme-provider.tsx: A React context that manages dark/light theme preference via localStorage and applies 'dark' class on <html>. Export useTheme() hook.

Create design system base components in components/ui/: Button.tsx (variants: primary, secondary, ghost, danger; sizes: sm, md, lg; with loading state and spring hover/tap animation via framer-motion), Input.tsx (with label, error state, focus ring animation), Modal.tsx (portal-based, backdrop blur, scale-in animation, dismissible on escape/backdrop click), Toggle.tsx (animated switch with spring transition), Card.tsx (surface with hover elevation, optional border glow), Badge.tsx (color variants, pill shape).

Update app/layout.tsx to wrap children with ThemeProvider (inside Providers). Keep Inter and JetBrains_Mono font loading. Update metadata title/description. Keep the existing Providers wrapping SessionProvider.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm install succeeds with all new deps resolved
pnpm build succeeds with no TypeScript errors
Theme provider exports useTheme() hook that toggles dark/light mode
All design system components (Button, Input, Modal, Toggle, Card, Badge) exist and export properly
CSS variables defined for both light and dark themes in globals.css
tailwind.config.ts has the new Notion-inspired token system
findings: Build and lint pass cleanly. Had to strip conflicting React event handler props (onAnimationStart, onDragStart, onDragEnd, onDrag) from Input component before spreading onto motion.input to avoid Framer Motion type conflict. Used `as Record<string, unknown>` cast for the remaining props spread. The recharts package shows a deprecation warning for v2 but installs and works fine. pnpm-lock.yaml was updated.
